name: Grilled Hawaiian Fish in Basil-Coconut Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan on high heat, bring white wine to a boil and add fresh ginger, fresh lemon grass (or lemon peel), kaffir lime leaves, and red curry paste.
Simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
2. In a blender, whirl the mixture with cornstarch and coconut milk until smooth. Return to the pan and stir over high heat until boiling. If made ahead, chill up to 1 day in an airtight container. Reheat gently; if needed, add coconut milk to thin. Stir in fresh basil leaves before serving.
3. Grill the Hawaiian fish and garnish with basil once cooked. Adjust seasoning with salt as desired.
